p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 10 pass_to_pass tests for repo CI/CD checks. 7 tests pass on base commit (custom_init_isort, sort_auto_mappings, check_dummies, check_doctest_list, check_inits, makefile_core_targets_exist, agents_md_has_make_commands). 5 tests skip gracefully when dependencies missing (ruff, ty, pyyaml, regex). Tests include proper skip logic using pytest.skip() for optional dependencies. All tests complete within 60 second timeout.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: Docker build successful, NOP test returns reward=0 (9 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base commit, 7 pass-to-pass tests pass, 5 skipped), Gold test returns reward=1 (all 16 tests pass after applying gold fix via solve.sh), Rubric judge ICR=1.0 (gold solution follows all style/convention rules).
